The Problem

Your posture is getting worse every year

The average adult spends 10+ hours per day sitting. The result? Rounded shoulders, forward head posture, and chronic pain that compounds with every passing month.

  • 💢
    Chronic neck & back pain

    Poor posture puts up to 60 lbs of extra force on your spine. That ache isn't random — it's structural damage compounding every day you wait.

  • 😮‍💨
    Drained energy & brain fog

    Slouching compresses your lungs by up to 30%. Less oxygen means less clarity, worse mood, and that heavy afternoon crash you can't shake.

  • 📉
    You look less confident

    Research shows slouchers are judged as less capable, less attractive, and less trustworthy — before they say a word. Posture is silent authority.

  • ⏳
    It gets worse every single day

    Without correction, your muscles adapt to the wrong position permanently. Waiting makes it exponentially harder — and more expensive — to fix.

Engineered to correct, not just support

Four things that make ALIGNO™ fundamentally different from anything you've tried before.

Feel your shoulders draw back and chest open the moment you put it on. Immediate, visible improvement — not just compression or temporary support.

The Process

Three steps to a permanently straighter back

01

Put it on in 60 seconds

Slip your arms through the shoulder loops, cross the straps behind your back in a figure-8, and fasten the Velcro. No tools, no help needed — comfortable from the first second.

⏱ Under 60 seconds
02

Wear 10–30 min/day

Start with 10 minutes. Mild muscle soreness means it's working — your corrector muscles are activating for the first time in years. Add 10 minutes each day until you're at 30–60 min comfortably.

⏱ Just 10 min to start
03

Stand straight automatically

Within 3–6 weeks your muscles develop memory for the correct position. You'll catch yourself standing straight — with or without ALIGNO™ on. That's the goal. That's real correction.

⚡ Lasting results in 3–6 weeks
💡 Pro tip from our customers

The best results come from wearing ALIGNO™ during a specific daily habit — morning coffee, commute, or first hour of work. The consistency is what builds lasting muscle memory.

FAQ

Your questions, answered

How long until I see real results? +
Most customers feel an immediate improvement in posture while wearing ALIGNO™. Lasting results — where your posture stays corrected without the brace — develop within 3–6 weeks of daily use (20–30 min/day).
What size do I need? +
ALIGNO™ is one size fits all. The fully adjustable figure-8 straps fit chest circumferences from 25 to 55 inches (60–140 cm). You don't need to pick a size — just order and go.
Can I wear it under my clothes without it showing? +
Yes — that's exactly what it's designed for. The ultra-slim profile sits flush against your body and is undetectable under t-shirts, dress shirts, and blouses. Thousands of customers wear it at the office every day without anyone noticing.
Will it hurt? +
You may feel mild muscle soreness in the first 1–3 days — this is completely normal and means the brace is actively engaging your postural muscles. Start with 10 minutes and add time gradually. The discomfort fades quickly as your body adapts.
What if it doesn't work for me? +
We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked. Contact us within 14 days of delivery for a full refund. We've processed thousands of refunds without hassle — though our return rate is under 4%.
How fast will my order arrive? +
All orders are dispatched within 24 hours (Mon–Fri). Delivery typically takes 5–7 business days worldwide. You'll receive a tracking number by email immediately after dispatch.
Is it suitable for all body types? +
Yes. ALIGNO™ fits chest circumferences from 25" to 55" and works equally well for men and women of all body types. The figure-8 design adapts naturally to your shape. Over 50,000 customers across every body type have used it successfully.
